## How to Test

1. Open this repo in VS Code and press `F5` to launch the Extension Development Host
2. Select the affected theme(s) from File > Preferences > Color Theme
3. Open a file in the relevant language and verify the color changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Color changes applied to both italics and no-italics variants
- [ ] `package.json` version bumped (if releasing)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Screenshots updated in `images/` (if colors changed significantly)
- [ ] Ran `npx vsce package` successfully
